ranked_matches.title: IPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals vs Chennai Super Kings (Scheduled 2:05 PM UTC)

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final concluded today with South Australia defeating Victoria. The major live event today is the IPL 2026 match between Rajasthan Royals and Chennai Super Kings, scheduled for later in the day (7:30 PM IST / 2:05 PM UTC). No matches are currently live at 02:35 UTC.
